evidence_summary: User reported Yahoo did not recognize AAPL and returned null results for search URL.
diagnosis: Possible access/rate-limit/session issue or endpoint anomaly; not enough evidence to mark AAPL invalid.
recommended_next_action: Re-run with HTTP status capture, User-Agent, q=Apple fallback, and quote endpoint health check.

evidence_summary: User reported Yahoo did not recognize AAPL and returned null results for chart URL.
diagnosis: Likely endpoint/access/rate/session issue if quote also fails; chart error object needed for proof.
recommended_next_action: Re-run and capture HTTP status plus chart.error.code/description.

evidence_summary: User reported null results for screener URL(s).
diagnosis: Predefined screener URL is not AAPL-specific; failure indicates endpoint/request/access condition.
recommended_next_action: Re-run with HTTP status; do not classify as an AAPL symbol recognition failure.

evidence_summary: Direct fetch of search, quote, chart, and screener endpoints returned HTTP 429 Too Many Requests in this environment.
diagnosis: Strong evidence that access/rate limiting can mimic null or empty symbol failures.
recommended_next_action: Add result_state and HTTP diagnostics to capture process before field extraction.
